hospitalInformation.tagline: Advanced Super Specialty Care for ENT, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Oncosurgery, Opthalmology, Dental sciences, Dermatology, Plastic Surgery, Psychiatry, Pulmonary and More…
hospitalInformation.about: At Life Care Hospital, we believe that healthcare is not merely about treating ailments, but about nurturing lives with compassion, precision, and innovation. Established with a commitment to deliver world-class healthcare solutions, we stand as one of Ahmedabad’s leading multi-specialty hospitals, trusted by patients and families alike. With LIOHNS at its core, Life Care Hospital is setting new benchmarks in healthcare excellence in Ahmedabad and across Gujarat.
hospitalInformation.vision: Our vision is to invent the future of health care technologies.
hospitalInformation.mission: Our mission is to care for our patients and their families when it matters most.
hospitalInformation.whyChooseUs: Trusted Legacy – Built on strong values and guided by visionary leadership. Advanced Medical Technology – State-of-the-art diagnostic tools and surgical techniques. Expert Team – A multidisciplinary panel of highly qualified doctors, surgeons, and healthcare professionals. Personalized Care – Every treatment plan is tailored to the patient’s unique needs. Holistic Healing – We believe in treating the person, not just the illness.
hospitalInformation.chairmanMessage: At Life Care Hospital, we believe healthcare is not a business but a responsibility. Our mission is to deliver personalized care with clinical excellence and compassionate service, ensuring every patient feels valued and is cared for. - Shri. Ajay Vora, Chairman

heroSection.heroSubtitle: We are open 24/7 at your service. Advanced Super Specialty Care specializing in the treatment of organs above the neck — from the ear, nose, throat, and oral cavity to the brain, nerves, and head-neck cancers.

doctorsData.name: Dr. Abhijit Makwana

departments.description: Expert diagnosis & treatment of brain & nervous system

services.description: Lifecare Hospital offers 24x7 emergency care with specialized ICU support and neurosurgery backup.
Reliable ambulance services, ensuring patients get timely care when every second counts.
Sample pickup at your home & give 99.8% accuracy in results.
Medicines at your doorsteps. Shop your medicine online from LIOHN. Essentials at your doorstep anytime in emergency situation.
Private rooms are quieter and safer than shared rooms and better for your recovery. Every patient gets their own private room.

contactInformation.address: Beside Sarva Mangal Hall , Near swami vivekanand Chowk , Memnagar , Ahmedabad- 380052

faqSection.question: What specialties does Lifecare Hospital provide?
faqSection.answer: We specialize in above-the-neck super specialty care, including ENT, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Oncosurgery, Ophthalmology, Dental Sciences, Dermatology, Plastic Surgery, Psychiatry, and Pulmonary medicine.

faqSection.question: How can I book an appointment?
faqSection.answer: Appointments can be booked easily through Call on our helpline number or Visiting the hospital reception directly.

faqSection.question: Do the hospital provides emergency services?
faqSection.answer: Yes, Lifecare Hospital offers 24x7 emergency care with specialized ICU support, neurosurgery backup, and ambulance facilities.

faqSection.question: What facilities are available at Lifecare Hospital?
faqSection.answer: Advanced Operation Theatres, Dedicated Neuro-ICU, Radiology & Imaging (CT, MRI, Ultrasound), Pathology & Diagnostics, Pharmacy & Day-Care Services.

faqSection.question: Does Lifecare Hospital accept health insurance?
faqSection.answer: Yes, we work with a wide range of health insurance providers and TPAs. Our billing team assists patients with claims and cashless hospitalization.

faqSection.question: Do you have online consultation facilities?
faqSection.answer: Yes, we provide online video consultations for follow-ups and non-emergency cases. You can book an e-consultation via our website or WhatsApp helpline.

faqSection.question: Where is Lifecare Hospital located?
faqSection.answer: Our hospital is located Beside Sarva Mangal Hall , Near swami vivekanand Chowk , Memnagar , Ahmedabad- 380052.

faqSection.question: How do I prepare for my first visit?
faqSection.answer: Please bring your previous medical records, investigation reports, prescriptions. This helps our specialists understand your medical history better.
